title: The Lazy Song
why_this_song: The Lazy Song by Bruno Mars (2010) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I just wanna lay in my bed
Don't feel like picking up my phone
So leave a message at the tone
'Cause today, I swear I'm not doing anything
Tomorrow, I'll wake up, do some P90X
Meet a really nice girl, have some really nice sex

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "today" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "today" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "don't" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:

excerpts.text: I just wanna lay in my bed
(Oh, my God, this is great) yeah
No, I ain't gonna comb my hair

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "The Lazy Song" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "The Lazy Song"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Bruno Mars one question about "The Lazy Song", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Bruno Mars sobre "The Lazy Song", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "The Lazy Song" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "The Lazy Song" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
